entities.name: RED HAIRY CATERPILLAR
entities.description: A pest known as Amsacta albistriga that affects rainy season crops in Asia

entities.name: RAINY SEASON CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown during the rainy season in Asia that are targeted by the red hairy caterpillar

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the red hairy caterpillar is a pest

entities.name: INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of being invaded by the red hairy caterpillar, described as sporadic but devastating

entities.name: PROLONGED DIAPAUSE
entities.description: A biological state of the red hairy caterpillar that makes chemical protection insufficient

entities.name: LARVAL MIGRATORY BEHAVIOR
entities.description: A behavioral characteristic of the red hairy caterpillar larvae that makes chemical protection insufficient

entities.name: IRREGULAR ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: A characteristic of the red hairy caterpillar's life cycle that makes chemical protection insufficient

entities.name: CHEMICAL PROTECTION
entities.description: A method of pest control that is insufficient on its own due to the caterpillar's biological traits
